did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is an opinion/review article that discusses the potential and past examples of AI applications in dermatology (such as classifying actinic keratosis and squamous cell carcinoma using LC-OCT or clinical images). It does not present original research where the authors used AI to obtain new study results; rather, it reviews existing literature and proposes future directions.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
